name: Bagels
flavor: Pinstripes, posture, and a team that takes itself dead seriously despite the name. The Turnpike's gold standard.

name: Pepperoni Slices
flavor: Old-school pizzeria neon and red sauce on the cleats. The natural-born nemesis of the Bagels.

name: Eagle Rockers
flavor: Plays at the overlook with the Manhattan skyline behind them. Dignified, scenic, very particular about the view.

name: Lincoln Tunnellers
flavor: Vintage 1937 commuter team — sodium-light glow, tile cream, the smell of exhaust and coffee. Wins on grit.

name: Parkways
flavor: Modern, civic, sans-serif. The highway-sign team in a league of personalities.

name: Mischief Nighters
flavor: Suburban Halloween-eve mischief. Spooky-cute autumn Americana — the team that toilet-papers your ace.

name: Diner Rats
flavor: 2am at the 24-hour diner. Scrappy, urban, late-night, fueled by disco fries and bad decisions.

name: Boardwalk Bandits
flavor: Sun-faded shore vibes. Mascot is a seagull who steals your fries the moment you look down at the box score.

name: Rippers
flavor: Working-class roadside team named after Rutt's Hut deep-fried hot dogs. Wins ugly, doesn't apologize.

name: Meadowlands
flavor: Industrial swampland gravitas. The atmospheric heavyweight — fog, neon, exit-ramp menace.

name: Ramapos
flavor: Forest lake at sunrise. Pine trees, calm water, the team that plays in the woods. Quiet but tough — like a porcupine with a bat.

name: Black Bears
flavor: Sussex County wilderness team. Quiet, dignified, deceptively powerful — the bear you actually meet on a hiking trail.

name: Goldfinches
flavor: NJ state bird, the bright lemon-yellow team. Small, fast, scrappy — the leadoff hitter of the league.

name: Devil's Hole
flavor: Cedar Grove folklore made flesh. Vintage gothic woodcut energy, eerie crimson glow, slightly haunted — the swimming hole locals warned you about.

name: Baked Zities
flavor: Sunday family dinner abundance. Warm, generous, smells faintly of garlic — the team that brings tupperware to away games.

name: Continentals
flavor: 90s corporate aviation nostalgia. Banner-hanging, championship-coded, suit-and-tie confidence. Won, didn't celebrate, took the meeting.

name: Stone Ponys
flavor: Asbury Park rock club energy. Black-and-white, leather-jacket confidence, plays night games like it's at the Pony in 1978.

name: Ocean Grovers
flavor: Sunrise on the Atlantic. Wholesome shore energy — bodyboards, sunburns, families with picnic blankets.

name: Spheres
flavor: Liberty Science Center modern. Brushed silver, electric blue, geodesic future-coded — the league's tomorrow team.

name: Edisons
flavor: Vintage inventor warmth. Filament-bulb glow, Menlo Park lab, phonograph wax — the team that failed 999 times.
